title: Statement Regarding Termination of MF Global Inc. as a Primary Dealer

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: The Federal Reserve Bank of New York terminated MF Global Inc.'s status as a primary dealer on October 31, 2011. This was a routine administrative notice announcing the change in primary dealer relationships. The source provides no context about the reason for termination, MF Global's subsequent bankruptcy filing later that same day, or any market impact data.
key_points: The Federal Reserve Bank of New York officially terminated MF Global Inc.'s primary dealer status on October 31, 2011
The New York Fed maintains policies governing primary dealer relationships available at their website
Contact information for media inquiries was provided (Jonathan Freed)
The statement is one paragraph long with no additional detail
No vote tally, policy rationale, or market context was included in the source
why_it_matters: Primary dealer status is significant for market structure as it grants institutions access to Treasury auctions and the ability to trade directly with the Federal Reserve. The termination of a primary dealer, particularly one that filed for bankruptcy hours later, represents a notable market infrastructure event. However, this source provides only the bare announcement without supporting context.
market_structure_context: The source documents a change in primary dealer relationships, which is a market structure topic. Primary dealers serve as counterparties for the Federal Reserve's open market operations and play a key role in Treasury market liquidity. The termination of MF Global's primary dealer status represents a change in the Fed's official dealer network, though no details about the circumstances are provided in this source.

issues_found: Source is extremely thin - only a single substantive paragraph with no contextual detail
Source predates TODAY by over 14 years (2011-10-31), flagged as historical
No information about the reason for termination or MF Global's bankruptcy filing the same day
No market impact data, vote tally, or forward-looking statements provided

human_review.notes: Record is factually accurate and properly attributes source. Human review not required as the record correctly characterizes the thin source and does not overstate its contents.
